description: Ground truth from abstracts of OA RCT PDFs

entries.title: Statin Use in Patients With Advanced Prostate Cancer in the TITAN and SPARTAN Trials.
entries.abstract:
IMPORTANCE: The impact of statins on overall survival (OS) in patients with prostate cancer treated using intensified therapy with apalutamide is not fully understood.
OBJECTIVE: To determine whether statin exposure was associated with OS and grade 3 or greater cardiac adverse events (AEs) in patients treated with apalutamide.
DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS: This cohort study used individual patient data from 2 multicenter phase 3 randomized clinical trials, SPARTAN (October 14, 2013, to Dece
